name: Beijing SOJO Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing SOJO Electric Co., Ltd. engages in the research, production, sale, and export of power distribution equipment and automation equipment in the field of power transmission and distribution networks. It offers medium voltage switchgears, including solid insulated switchgears/RMU, SF6 insulated switchgears, air insulated switchgears, and air insulated compact switchgears; outdoor switch/reclosers, such as medium voltage outdoor vacuum reclosers, medium voltage outdoor circuit breakers, and outdoor load break switches; and switchgear components and cable accessories. The company also offers dry type, oil immersed, power, and special transformers; compact pre-fabricated substations; low voltage products and systems, including fixed-type low voltage switchgears, withdrawable low voltage switchgears, and low voltage multifunctional switchboards; and relay protection and automation equipment comprising feeder terminal units, data transfer units, protection control equipment, communication controllers, and fault indicator equipment. In addition, it provides power quality mitigation devices, such as active power filters, static VAR generators, and smart three-phase unbalance regulators; and cable sectionalizing cabinets, including medium and low voltage cable sectionalizing cabinets. The company's products are used in electrical, railway, oil, underground, military, steel, coal and electrical vehicles industry, etc. It also offers energy solutions, such as EV chargers, distributed photovoltaic grid systems, and Li-ion battery separators. Beijing SOJO Electric Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
